title: [Let's Do Addon]: Photographers
description: A mod that adds a photographer profession for the Let's Do: Meadow camera block
body:
# [Let's Do Addon]: Photographers

This is a simple mod that adds a photographer villager who uses the camera block from [Let's Do: Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow/) as a workstation.

If [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure/) is installed, items from it will be used for trades.
